content_body: Me and my best friend saw a video online of the perfect vacation. It was Blue Ridge, GA. With COVID we had no options for our kids all summer, so we got the crazy idea to go to this place. YOU DID NOT DISAPPOINT! We came with our kids ranging from infact to 10 years old. All summer cooped up in a house, this trip made their summer! We will most definitely be back!  Be sure to check out Fall Branch Falls - it's a waterfall hike...simple and sweet! Thank you so much for sharing your home with us for a few days! ~ Florida
title: Best Friend Getaway to Blue Ridge
